speaker._note: Jake — cynical press-pool reporter, rendered with Aiden's voice
speaker.name: Jake

dialog.speaker: Narrator
dialog.text: It was the most tremendous press conference the world had ever seen. At least — that is what the press release said. It used the word tremendous eleven times. Two of them were in the subtitle.

dialog.speaker: Narrator
dialog.text: The motorcade arrived. The lobby doors swung open. The elevator obliged. Donald J. Trump had entered the building.

dialog.speaker: Donald Trump
dialog.text: Great elevator. Possibly the best elevator I have ever ridden in my entire life. People are going to be talking about this elevator. Now — the plan. The greatest plan ever assembled. In a folder.

dialog.speaker: Jake
dialog.text: Is that a zip file. Printed out. On paper.

dialog.speaker: Narrator
dialog.text: The ballroom was packed. Cameras from thirty networks. And, for reasons nobody investigated, a cat.

dialog.speaker: Donald Trump
dialog.text: Ladies and gentlemen — I have solved everything. Every problem. All of them. Done. You are welcome, America.

dialog.speaker: Donald Trump
dialog.text: Now — the highlights of the plan. Point one — what — was there a — did I just step on —

dialog.speaker: Narrator
dialog.text: He had stepped on the cat. The cat expressed its position. Diplomatically, but clearly.

dialog.speaker: Donald Trump
dialog.text: Great cat. Beautiful animal. Love cats. Now — point two of the plan — That was the podium. Incredible craftsmanship. Very loose bolts. Fake news if anyone says differently.

dialog.speaker: Narrator
dialog.text: Someone in the hall began to laugh. The crowd sighed with collective disappointment. And somewhere in the back — slowly, politely — people began to clap.

dialog.speaker: Narrator
dialog.text: Outside, the sky had made its own statement. Thunder rolled across the city. The weather, for once, was on the record.

dialog.speaker: Jake
dialog.text: Any final comment for the cameras, Mister President?

dialog.speaker: Donald Trump
dialog.text: Perfect. Absolutely perfect event. The cat was unplanned — adds warmth. The podium situation — very technical, people wouldn't understand. People are calling me right now, Jake. They're saying: Don, that was the greatest press conference we have ever witnessed in our entire lives.

dialog.speaker: Jake
dialog.text: Who. Who specifically is calling you.

dialog.speaker: Narrator
dialog.text: The bell tolled. The cameras went dark. Somewhere in the hotel, the cat was still somewhere. And someone, already, was writing the next press release. It would use the word tremendous fourteen times. Three of them in the title.
